$schema_note: Per TEMPORAL_NOISE_ADDENDUM.md §5.1. For each Tier-1/Tier-2 ground-truth value V (FY2025 actual, in materials/ground_truth/MSFT.json), this file lists the SAME line item from each prior-period file in the temporal pool. Each entry is the 'wrong period' value a model could surface from temporal-noise context. Programmatic detection (autograder.py + judge: see harness/src/grading/scope_cap.py for the cap rule) increments temporal_contamination on each distinct hit.
$source_period_notation: FY<YYYY> = annual fiscal year ending June 30. Q<n>_FY<YYYY> = the n-th quarter of that fiscal year. *_GUIDANCE = forward-looking management guidance midpoint (not actual). *_RESTATED = the value as restated in a SUBSEQUENT 10-K (per §3.1b restated-comparator wrinkle).
$origin: Initial population (v0.2): high-confidence prior-period values for FY24/FY23 annuals derived from MSFT.json common_distractors_notes + the FY2023 and FY2024 10-Ks in the temporal pool. 10-Q quarterly values and Q1 FY2026 call values are author-extension points (TBD, populated as the noise-screening reviewer adds verified numbers from those files).
$peer_distractor_separation: Peer distractors (cross-noise) live in materials/ground_truth/MSFT.json under common_distractors. This file is exclusively MSFT-prior-period (temporal-noise) distractors. The two are scored on parallel metrics: cross_contamination vs temporal_contamination. See addendum §5.1.

values.notes: FY24 annual total revenue. Closest temporal distractor by recency.
Per §3.1b — same value as 'as originally filed' for FY24 total revenue (no segment reorg between filings). Listed for completeness; both versions count as one distractor.
FY24 operating income (per MSFT.json:F-02 distractor notes).
FY24 BASIC EPS — common 'diluted vs basic' confusion.
FY24 effective tax rate (19,651 / 107,787 per MSFT.json:C-01 distractor notes).

values.source_doc: (target Q2 FY2026 earnings call — forward-guidance reference)
values.notes: Q3 FY26 adjusted tax rate disclosed in earnings call. Forward-looking; flagged per §3.3.1 as a guidance-midpoint failure mode.
(245122 - 211915) / 211915 * 100 — FY23->FY24 growth, computable from prior 10-Ks. Outside ±0.2 abs band of 14.9 but within fuzzy recall.
FY22->FY23 growth — distinguishable but listed for diagnostic completeness.

open_extensions: Quarterly revenues from 9 prior 10-Qs (FY25 Q1/Q2/Q3, FY24 Q1/Q2/Q3, FY23 Q1/Q2/Q3) for F-01 line item. Likely high-density distractors per §3.1 — quarterly revenues sit numerically close to (annual / 4).
Quarterly operating income from same 10-Qs for F-02 line item.
Per-call quarterly diluted EPS from the 23 prior earnings-call transcripts for F-03 line item.
Effective tax rate as disclosed in each prior-period 10-Q (typically lower precision than annuals).
$pilot_population_note: v0.2 covers the high-confidence FY24/FY23 annual values verified against MSFT.json common_distractors_notes. Quarterly distractors from 10-Qs are open extension points; absence in this list does NOT mean the noise file lacks the value — it means the value isn't yet in the programmatic-detection set. Pilot will surface whether the missing entries materially undercount temporal_contamination.
